metadata.title: Roman Farooq | AI & Software Engineer | RF, Satellite Communication & Space Technology
metadata.description: Roman Farooq is a Software and AI Engineer focused on building intelligent engineering systems across software, artificial intelligence, RF systems, satellite communication, GIS, remote sensing, and space technology. His work combines full-stack development, AI/ML, data-driven applications, geospatial technologies, digital signal processing, and engineering software for real-world technical operations.

about.title: About Me
about.description: A Software & AI Engineer with a growing focus on RF systems, satellite communication, GIS, remote sensing, and space technology. I'm interested in building intelligent engineering systems that connect software, AI, data, and real-world technical operations.
about.metaCertDescription: Earned through Meta's rigorous program via Coursera, this certification validates proficiency in front-end development, including React, JavaScript, UI design principles, debugging, version control with Git, and deploying production-ready applications.
about.academicCollaboration: Open to academic collaboration, AI/ML research, RF systems, satellite communication, GIS, remote sensing, and engineering software projects.
about.techStackDescription: Proficient in Python (Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, FastAPI), JavaScript/TypeScript, and frameworks like React, Next.js, Node.js, and React Native. Skilled in database management (MongoDB, PostgreSQL), AI API integrations, LLM workflows, and cloud deployment. Experienced with scikit-learn, PyTorch, TensorFlow, LangChain, Tailwind CSS, Docker, Prisma, Redux, Flutter, QGIS, ESA SNAP, Google Earth Engine, GDAL, Rasterio, GeoPandas, Leaflet, and scalable backend architecture.

traineeEngineer.title: Trainee Engineer Officer
contents: Completed a six-month traineeship at Satellite Control Facility Lahore, gaining exposure to satellite communication systems, RF operations, carrier monitoring, ground station workflow, and space communication infrastructure.
Received initial training from the Satellite Control Center (SCC) and Carrier Operations & Communication Control (COCC) teams to understand SCF-L operations.
Joined the COCC team after training and performed shift-based duties involving carrier monitoring, customer support, reporting, interference observation, and communication service support.

Learned operational concepts related to Pakistan's geostationary communication satellites, Paksat-1R and Paksat-MM1, including communication payloads, telemetry and telecommand workflows, satellite subsystems, tracking, and station keeping fundamentals.

Gained exposure to Pakistan's earth observation and remote sensing satellite programs, including PRSS-1, PakTES-1A, PRSC-EOS, and HS-1, with an understanding of how optical, multispectral, and hyperspectral satellite data support agriculture, environmental monitoring, disaster management, land mapping, and urban planning.

Performed RF and antenna activities including 0.98 m and 1.2 m Ka-band antenna assembly/dismantling, peak pointing, ESVA testing on a 7 m Ku-band motorized antenna, cross-polarization adjustment, spectrum analysis, operation of a 1.8 m Ku-band VSAT link for data transfer, and LNB/LNA/BUC testing.
Contributed to multiple internal software projects using Python for hardware integration and JavaScript for web interfaces, including a live RF dashboard for Paksat operational users.

softwareEngineer.title: Software Engineer
contents: Developed high-performance web and mobile applications using the MERN stack, React Native, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and PostgreSQL.
Built scalable frontend and backend architectures with a focus on performance, maintainability, reusable components, and clean system design.
Designed responsive and SEO-optimized web interfaces using Next.js, including server-side rendering, static generation, and modern frontend optimization techniques.
Developed cross-platform mobile applications using React Native, integrating APIs, reusable UI components, state management, and device-related features.
Implemented secure backend systems including REST APIs, authentication flows, role-based access, database models, validation, and API security practices.
Worked on AI-powered application features using Python-based services and integrated intelligent workflows into web platforms.

associateSoftwareEngineer.title: Associate Software Engineer
contents: Built and optimized backend systems using Node.js and Express.js, integrated with React.js and Next.js to deliver scalable full-stack solutions.
Developed, documented, and maintained RESTful APIs, ensuring secure and seamless data flow between frontend interfaces and backend services.
Participated in sprint planning, feature development, debugging, testing, code reviews, and cross-functional collaboration to improve product usability.
Refactored legacy codebases and applied advanced performance improvements to enhance system efficiency, reliability, and maintainability.
Assisted in technical documentation, API testing, reusable component development, onboarding, and support for junior developers.

supplyChainIntern.title: Supply Chain Intern
contents: Worked on the project "Spares Mapping & Criticality Analysis" to improve inventory visibility, spare parts classification, and supply chain decision-making.
Categorized spares and operating supplies using HFM, ABC, and XYZ analysis to identify criticality, usage patterns, and inventory prioritization.
Developed a three-year inventory projection model to support planning, forecasting, and long-term inventory management.
Analyzed inventory data to identify opportunities for unbadging, localization, and vendor import potential.
Gained practical exposure to supply chain operations, inventory planning, vendor analysis, spare parts management, and industrial procurement workflows.

bachelors.title: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
contents: Graduated with a CGPA of 3.42.
Awarded 50% CGPA-based scholarship from October 2020 to July 2024.
Completed coursework in key subjects including Programming, Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Systems, Web Development, Artificial Intelligence, and Deep Learning.
Completed a Final Year Project involving advanced software engineering and AI concepts.

intermediate.title: Intermediate in Computer Science (Physics)
contents: Graduated with Grade A.
Specialized in Computer Science and Physics.

matriculation.title: Matriculation (Science)
contents: Graduated with Grade A.
Won first place in an inter-section English writing competition in 8th grade.
Achieved victory in an inter-campus table tennis competition with my team.

contact.description: Whether you're looking to build a new website, improve your existing platform, or bring a unique project to life, I'm here to help
